description.value:
Disease: Demon Fever — Severity: [Deadly] — Stage 4

Effects: As Stage 3. Failure at this stage deals [[/damage 12]] damage per long rest and the character makes a [[/save type=will]] (Hard task) or acts erratically for 1d8 hours (GM determines behavior). Death is possible if untreated.

Recovery: [[/save type=fortitude]] at end of each long rest (Hard task — 2 successes cures; 1 success = no change; 0 = worsen). Magical healing alone suppresses symptoms for 24 hours but does not cure; Major Restoration cures completely.

system.vector: Daemon claws or bites, nexus-adjacent contamination, exposure to corrupted pneuma
system.specialRules: On failed long rest save: character makes a Will save (Hard task) or acts erratically for 1d8 hours (GM determines behavior). Death is possible if untreated.

damageTick.chatMessage: [[/damage 12]] damage from Demon Fever (Stage 4) — failed long rest save.

recovery.chatMessage: Make a [[/save type=fortitude]] to recover from Demon Fever (Stage 4).
